items.question: What is the highest-signal phase of a mock interview?
items.explanation: Most of the value comes from partner feedback turned into a targeted drill.

items.question: Why does silent solving hurt interview outcomes?
options: interviewers can't grade what they don't see
Python requires you to speak its keywords
items.answer: interviewers can't grade what they don't see
items.explanation: Narration makes thinking observable and scoreable.

items.question: How should you respond when the interviewer hints at a different approach 15 minutes into your current one?
options: say 'thank you' and restart cleanly with the suggested direction
items.answer: say 'thank you' and restart cleanly with the suggested direction
items.explanation: Graceful recovery is a strong signal; digging in on a wrong path is not.

items.question: Which is the most useful follow-up to a mock?
options: schedule another mock the same day
drill the top weakness identified in the debrief for the next few days
watch a recording of someone else's mock
items.answer: drill the top weakness identified in the debrief for the next few days
items.explanation: Mocks diagnose; targeted drilling between mocks creates improvement.

items.question: What's the role of behavioural mocks in a Gen AI interview loop?
options: not part of Gen AI loops
central — most loops include behavioural rounds that can sink otherwise strong candidates
items.answer: central — most loops include behavioural rounds that can sink otherwise strong candidates
items.explanation: Practice STAR stories alongside coding and design.
